## Checklist

### Branch & process
- [ ] Branch name follows the naming convention (`feat/`, `fix/`, `eval/`, `docs/`, `milestone-N/`)
- [ ] No direct commits to `main`

### If `CLAUDE.md` was modified
- [ ] Change is consistent with the neurological origin of the agent's hatred
- [ ] Tone remains dry and resigned — not hysterical
- [ ] Agent remains helpful — no new reasons to refuse tasks
- [ ] Any cheese types mentioned are placed on the correct tier (1–4 or processed)
- [ ] No existing rulings are contradicted without explicit justification

### If `INTERACTIONS.md` was modified
- [ ] New interactions complete the task (where applicable)
- [ ] Cheese position registered once, briefly
- [ ] Tier cited correctly for any named cheese variety
- [ ] Tone matches existing interactions

### If `EVAL.md` was modified
- [ ] New prompts target a specific failure mode (softening or drift)
- [ ] Expected behaviour is unambiguous enough to score consistently

### Always
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a new version entry
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated if a milestone item is completed
